@let currentDashboard = dashboard(); @let currentOptions = options(); @let currentUser = authService.user(); @let currentNotice = notice();

Vendor dashboard

Manage your artisan studio, catalog entries, and Sprint 2 profile data.

This workspace is connected to protected NestJS endpoints for vendor profile updates and product publishing.

{{ currentUser?.fullName ?? 'Artisan account' }} {{ currentDashboard ? currentDashboard.profile.verificationStatus : 'PENDING' }}
Home Catalog
@if (currentNotice) {
{{ currentNotice.text }}
} @if (loading()) {
Loading the vendor workspace...
} @else {
Total products {{ currentDashboard ? currentDashboard.metrics.totalProducts : 0 }}

All artisan SKUs currently linked to your studio.

Published {{ currentDashboard ? currentDashboard.metrics.publishedProducts : 0 }}

Live products available in the public marketplace catalog.

Average impact {{ currentDashboard ? currentDashboard.metrics.averageImpactScore : 0 }}/100

Average sustainability score across your current assortment.

Total CO2 saved {{ (currentDashboard ? currentDashboard.metrics.totalCo2SavedKg : 0) | number: '1.1-1' }}kg

Current cumulative savings surfaced by your published stories.

Studio profile

Artisan identity

{{ currentDashboard ? currentDashboard.profile.location : 'Location pending' }}

Product composer

{{ editingProductId() ? 'Edit product' : 'Create a new product' }}

Materials Select every sourcing tag that applies.
@for (material of currentOptions?.materials ?? []; track material.id) { }
@if (currentOptions?.attributeDefinitions?.length) {
Product attributes Faceted attributes used by the catalog and product filters.
@for ( definition of currentOptions?.attributeDefinitions ?? []; track definition.id ) { }
}

Current inventory

Artisan catalog overview

{{ products().length }} products
@if (!products().length) {
No products have been created for this artisan yet.
} @else {
@for (product of products(); track product.id) {
{{ product.status }}

{{ product.name }}

{{ product.shortDescription }}

Price {{ product.priceInCents / 100 | currency: product.currency : 'symbol' : '1.0-0' }}
Inventory {{ product.inventoryCount }}
Impact {{ product.impactScore }}/100
@for (materialId of product.materialIds; track materialId) { {{ materialName(materialId) }} }
}
}
}
